deals.Description: Lisbon-based startup building autonomous AI coworkers that integrate directly into everyday business workflows, designed to help businesses scale without being constrained by human headcount.
deals.Investors: Heartcore Capital, Florent Venture Partners, AlphaGraph
deals.Founders: Vasco Pedro, Gil Coelho, Fábio Kepler

deals.Description: Lisbon-based startup that designs and manufactures smart parcel lockers, runs the software that powers them, and manages the infrastructure for logistics companies. The company is also building an AI department.

An intelligent marketing system that brings integrated AI to marketing teams. It analyzes marketing data with full context and acts on it to improve execution across marketing, creative work, sales, and revenue operations.
